str:translations.str:about_feeds: This is a web feed, also known as an Atom feed. Subscribe by copying the URL from the address bar into your newsreader. Visit About Feeds to learn more and get started. It's free.

feed.title: ~/nbaig-dev - tech-wellness
feed.subtitle: I am a backend web developer with 14+ years of experience. In this blog I will be posting my journey with the Rust Programming Language.

entry.title: Mindful Coding: Integrating Meditation into Tech Work
entry.summary: Explore the transformative synergy of meditation and coding in "Mindful Coding: Integrating Meditation into Tech Work." Discover 15 ways mindful practices enhance focus, creativity, and overall well-being, fostering a positive coding culture. Embrace a balanced approach for improved productivity and job satisfaction. Share with fellow developers to inspire a mindful coding community.

entry.title: Mindful Tech: Incorporating Meditation into Coding
entry.summary: Dive into the synergy of mindfulness and coding! Explore breathing techniques, intentional coding sessions, and apps for a tech-infused zen journey. Enhance focus, collaboration, and well-being in the world of mindful tech. Share the wisdom with your coding community!
